zeroConfig.title: Zero-config setup
zeroConfig.description: Two commands set up your site and database — no manual environment configuration.

cli.title: All-in-one CLI
cli.description: Initialize, develop, self-check, and view status from a single command line tool.

gettingStarted.title: Easy to get started
gettingStarted.description: Interactive guides, environment checks, and status tips — open your site and admin right after startup.

modernUi.title: Modern interface
modernUi.description: A polished admin and public site with light and dark theme support.

content.title: Content & authoring
content.description: Built-in Markdown editor; articles, categories, tags, pages, comments, and media in one place.

integrations.title: Open integrations
integrations.description: Open APIs, access keys, and event callbacks for external systems and automation.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Chinese and English UI, comfortable on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

users.disableContent: 「{{name}}」 will not be able to sign in. Continue?
users.selectUsersFirst: Select at least one user first
users.deleteNotSupported: User deletion is not supported on the server API

users.deleteContent: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the user.

article.title: Articles
article.listLoadError: Failed to load articles. Ensure the API is running and you are signed in.
article.editLoadError: Failed to load article. Ensure it exists and the API is available.
article.markdownHint: Write body in Markdown (rich-text editor can be wired later via React.lazy).
article.settingsApplied: Settings applied — save the article to persist
article.noCategories: No categories yet. Add one below.
article.noTags: No tags yet. Type to add tags.
article.previewNoSiteUrl: Site URL is not configured. Set it in Settings to preview.
article.taxonomyNameHint: The name is how it appears on your site.
article.taxonomySlugHint: The slug is the URL-friendly version of the name (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens).
article.taxonomyDeleteCategoryHint: Move articles to another category before deleting.

editor.loadError: Editor failed to load. Please refresh and try again.
editor.restoreContent: Local cache from your last session was found. Restore it?
editor.defaultMarkdown:
# Heading 1

This is a normal paragraph. Separate paragraphs with a **blank line**. Inline styles: **bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~, and `inline code`.

## Heading 2

> A blockquote works well for callouts, quotes, or short notes.

### Heading 3

Bullet list:

- Item one
- Item two
  - Nested item

Numbered list:

1. Step one
2. Step two

#### Heading 4

Image (replace `/logo.png` with a URL from the media library):

![ReactPress sample image](/logo.png)

Link: [ReactPress on GitHub](https://github.com/fecommunity/reactpress)

---

Code block:

```js
console.log('Hello ReactPress');
```

Table:

| Column A | Column B |
| :------- | :------- |
| Cell 1   | Cell 2   |

> Tip: Use the toolbar for headings, images, tables, and code blocks. Set category, tags, and publish options in the sidebar.
editor.seoKeywordsHint: Defaults to selected tags from the sidebar
editor.seoDescriptionHint: SEO description uses the excerpt field below (max ~150 characters recommended)
editor.excerptHint: Used in lists and SEO when description is empty

comment.title: Comments
comment.loadError: Failed to load comments. Ensure the API is running and you are signed in.
comment.name: Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.noticeListEmpty: No notices yet. Use the button above to add one.
settings.generalDesc: Site-wide defaults for branding and URLs (themes may inherit or override)
settings.aboutDesc: Footer and social links (moved to Appearance → Customize)
settings.readingDesc: Homepage display, RSS, and reading preferences
settings.seoDesc: Site-wide SEO and analytics defaults (themes may inherit or override)
settings.loadError: Failed to load site settings. Ensure the API is available.
settings.tabEmptyHint: This settings screen has no form fields yet.

hints.systemSubTitle: In a few words, explain what this site is about. Example: "Just another blog site."
hints.systemUrl: The address visitors use to view your site. Include http:// or https://.
hints.adminSystemUrl: URL for the admin dashboard, often the same as the site address or a subpath.
hints.systemLogo: URL of your site logo. Square or horizontal PNG/SVG works best.
hints.systemFavicon: Shown in browser tabs, bookmarks, and on mobile home screens. Use a square image, at least 512×512 px.
hints.systemBg: Full-site background image URL. Leave empty for the default background.
hints.systemNoticeInfo: Add multiple notices, reorder them, and toggle visibility. Shown in a rotating site banner. HTML is supported.
hints.systemFooterInfo: Copyright, filing, or contact text in the footer. HTML is supported.
hints.aboutUsGithubUrl: Link for the GitHub icon in About us and the site header. Leave empty to hide.
hints.aboutUsCommentQr: Image URL for the community or comment QR popover. Leave empty to hide.
hints.aboutUsWechatQr: Image URL for the WeChat QR popover. Leave empty to hide.
hints.globalSetting: Advanced global options as JSON. Confirm field meanings before editing.
hints.smtpPass: Saved passwords appear as dots. Leave blank and save to keep the current password.
hints.testEmailTo: Email address that should receive the test message.
hints.oss: Object storage settings as JSON (bucket, region, keys, etc.).
hints.seoDesc: Used for search snippets; aim for about 120–160 characters.
hints.reading: Homepage display, RSS, and reading preferences.
hints.discussion: Comment moderation, notifications, and discussion rules.
hints.webhooks: Event callback URLs; creation and management will be added in a later release.
hints.themeInheritDefaults: These are site-wide defaults. Leave a field empty in Appearance → Customize to inherit; filled values apply only to that theme.

emailTest.title: Send test email
emailTest.desc: Send a test message with the SMTP settings above. You can verify unsaved values before saving.
emailTest.toRequired: Please enter a test recipient email
emailTest.configIncomplete: Please complete all SMTP fields first
emailTest.passwordRequired: Enter the SMTP password, or save it before testing
emailTest.sentSuccess: Test email sent — check the inbox
emailTest.sendFailed: Failed to send test email — check your SMTP settings

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarHint: Upload an image for your profile picture. Click Update Profile at the bottom to save changes.
profile.formInvalid: Please check that all required fields are filled in
profile.avatarUpdated: Avatar uploaded — save your profile to apply
profile.avatarRemoved: Avatar removed — click Update Profile to save
profile.passwordHint: After changing your password, sign in again with the new password.
profile.newPasswordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters
profile.passwordUpdateFailed: Failed to update password — check your current password

media.selectHint: Click an image to use it, or upload a new file

data.exportDesc: Export site settings, articles, and pages as JSON.
data.importDesc: Restore site settings from an exported JSON file.

appearance.themesDesc: Browse, install, and activate themes for the public site.
appearance.catalogDesc: Install from the built-in catalog, then activate or preview.
appearance.catalogEmpty: No themes match your filters. Try different search terms.
appearance.installNpmDesc: Enter an npm package spec. Official theme: @fecommunity/reactpress-theme-starter@1.0.0-beta.0
appearance.officialThemesDesc: Recommended for the public site — install from npm in one click.
appearance.noAppearanceSections: This theme has no appearance options yet.
appearance.author: Author: {{author}}
appearance.installSuccessHint: Theme installed. Click Activate to apply it to the public site.
appearance.activateSuccessWithSite: Theme activated. Public site is ready: {{url}}
appearance.activateSuccessPending: Theme activated. Public site is still starting: {{url}} (refresh shortly)
appearance.activatePhaseRestarting: Restarting the public site (theme dev on :3001)…
appearance.activatePhaseChecking: Waiting for the public site to respond: {{url}}
appearance.activateFailedSiteTimeout: Theme was enabled, but the public site did not respond in time: {{url}}
appearance.activateSwitching: Switching theme and waiting for the public site…
appearance.loadErrorAuth: Session expired (you may still be using an MSW mock token). Please sign in again.
appearance.noActiveTheme: Activate a theme under Appearance → Themes first
appearance.restoreSystemDefaultsDesc: Clears this theme's appearance overrides and inherits site-wide values from Settings. Preview updates immediately.
appearance.noticeInheritHint: Showing notices from Settings → General. Edits apply to this theme only.
appearance.previewLiveHint: Showing the live public site (active theme)
appearance.previewStubHint: Placeholder preview (activate the theme to view the live site)
appearance.previewSwitchingHint: Warmed themes usually switch within 3 seconds. First-time preview may compile for up to 10 seconds.
appearance.themeSettingsDesc: Configuration generated from the theme JSON Schema. Current theme: {{name}}
appearance.themeSettingsNoSchema: This theme has no options schema in its manifest.
appearance.navLinkListHint: One row per header link. Turn off “Visible” to hide on the site.
appearance.navLinkI18nTitle: How do header labels switch between Chinese and English?
appearance.navLinkI18nLocale: Set an i18n key (e.g. home, nav, archives): the theme resolves text from the site i18n bundle for the visitor locale (zh / en).
appearance.navLinkI18nLabel: Set Label to force the same text in every language (skips the translation key).
appearance.navLinkI18nSite: To edit zh/en strings, update the site setting.i18n JSON (merged with toolkit defaults). Common keys live under toolkit/src/config/locales.

plugins.emptyDesc: Plugin list comes from globalSetting.plugins; configure in Site Customize.

placeholder.defaultDescription: This module is mounted; business UI will be built here.
placeholder.themesDesc: Install, activate, and publish themes (extension API).

error.404Subtitle: Sorry, the page you visited does not exist.
